title: How EqualityMD Solves Healthcare Needs Upstream of Insurance
description: StartUp Health community member EqualityMD resolves up to 80% of health needs before insurance is triggered.
author: StartUp Health Media

title: Neotiv Brings Early Alzheimer’s Detection to Every Smartphone
description: Neotiv is developing an early Alzheimer's detection app that allows users to assess cognitive changes independently at home using their smartphones. The app is clinically validated and aims to provide timely diagnoses by detecting mild cognitive impairment early. With over 12,000 users across seven languages, Neotiv has gained significant traction and is now focused on expanding into the US market and raising capital.
author: StartUp Health Media

title: Invaluable Coaching - Beth Sanders' Health Transformer Experience
description: Long-time StartUp Health community member Beth Sanders, CEO & Co-founder of LifeBio, reflects on her involvement in the StartUp Health community since 2013 – and the priceless experience of capturing Stan Krein’s story.
author: StartUp Health Media

title: ViewMind Brings Scalable, Noninvasive Alzheimer’s Screening to Primary Care
description: StartUp Health community member Mark Edwards, CEO & Co-founder of ViewMind, shares how his team is advancing precision, scalable, and noninvasive screening for Alzheimer’s disease in primary care settings. He explains how current assessments are costly, invasive, and often out of reach, while ViewMind delivers accurate cognitive insights by measuring eye movements and pupillary responses within an extended reality headset. Their proprietary algorithms interpret complex data patterns to assess specific brain networks. Mark highlights early commercialization success across more than 20 concierge and longevity clinics, where ViewMind is used to measure cognition before, during, and after treatments. He also reflects on the role of the Alzheimer’s Health Moonshot Community in raising awareness and connecting them with mission-aligned partners.
author: StartUp Health Media

title: Sinaptica: Groundbreaking Personalized Precision Medicine for Brain Stimulation
description: StartUp Health community member Sinaptica's patented closed-loop system delivers personalized precision medicine by confirming stimulation of correct brain networks and inducing neuroplasticity in moderate and mild Alzheimer's disease patients.
author: StartUp Health Media

title: Devoted Health Closes $366M Series F | StartUp Health Insights: Week of Feb 17, 2026
description: A long-time member of the StartUp Health community, Devoted Health’s mission is to dramatically improve health and wellbeing by caring for everyone like they are family. Beyond Devoted, a busy and global week saw major raises across mental health, medical devices, AI-powered health plans, oncology care, digital therapeutics, and healthcare operations, with funding spanning North America, Europe, Asia, Africa, and Australia.
author: StartUp Health Media

title: Live from Apollo House: Building the Modern Health Stack in the Age of Superintelligence
description: Recorded live at StartUp Health’s Apollo House during JPM Healthcare Week, this panel brings together leaders operating at the intersection of healthcare delivery, diagnostics, cloud infrastructure, and AI. Moderated by Angela Shippy, MD, of Amazon Web Services, the conversation explores how AI is moving from point solutions to foundational infrastructure across the modern health stack.
author: StartUp Health Media

title: The Caregiving Front Door: How CAREgivers Insight Is Rewiring Home-Clinic Connections
description: In this Health Moonshot Update, StartUp Health community member Christopher Jue of CAREgivers Insight joins Unity Stoakes to share how empowering caregivers can prevent crises and save the system money.
author: StartUp Health Media
